1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.Rule
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION
  5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATION
  6→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATION_ENTRY
  7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST
  8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST
  9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_ARGUMENT
 10→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST
 11→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_PARAMETER
 12→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.WHITE_SPACE
 13→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.children
 14→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.firstChildLeafOrSelf
 15→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isPartOf
 16→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isPartOfComment
 17→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isWhiteSpace
 18→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline
 19→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.lastChildLeafOrSelf
 20→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.nextCodeLeaf
 21→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.nextLeaf
 22→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.prevLeaf
 23→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 24→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 25→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiWhiteSpace
 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 28→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.descriptors.annotations.AnnotationUseSiteTarget
 29→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtAnnotationEntry
 30→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 31→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.siblings
 32→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.utils.addToStdlib.safeAs
 33→
 34→/**
 35→ * Ensures multiple annotations are not on the same line as the annotated declaration. Also ensures that annotations
 36→ * with parameters are placed on separate lines.
 37→ *
 38→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 39→ *
 40→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules. Moved since
 41→ */
 42→public class AnnotationRule : Rule("annotation") {
 43→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 44→        node: ASTNode,
 45→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 46→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 47→    ) {
 48→        when (node.elementType) {
 49→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
 50→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 51→            }
 52→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY ->
 53→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 54→        }
 55→    }
 56→
 57→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
 58→        node: ASTNode,
 59→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 60→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 61→    ) {
 62→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
 63→
 64→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
 65→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER && // fun fn(@Ann("blah") a: String)
 66→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT && // fn(@Ann("blah") "42")
 67→            !node.isPartOf(TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST) && // val property: Map<@Ann("blah") String, Int>
 68→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
 69→        ) {
 70→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 71→        }
 72→
 73→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
 74→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct())
 75→        ) {
 76→            checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 77→        }
 78→
 79→        if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
 80→            node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() &&
 81→            node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
 82→        ) {
 83→            checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 84→        }
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
 88→        node: ASTNode,
 89→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 90→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 91→    ) {
 92→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
 93→            emit(
 94→                node.startOffset,
 95→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
 96→                true,
 97→            )
 98→            if (autoCorrect) {
 99→                node
100→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
101→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
102→            }
103→        }
104→
105→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
106→            emit(
107→                node.startOffset,
108→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
109→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
110→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
111→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
112→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
113→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
114→            )
115→            if (autoCorrect) {
116→                node
117→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
118→                    .nextLeaf()
119→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
120→                    ?.let {
121→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
122→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
123→                        } else {
124→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
125→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
126→                            )
127→                        }
128→                    }
129→            }
130→        }
131→    }
132→
133→    private fun checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(
134→        node: ASTNode,
135→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
136→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
137→    ) {
138→        if (node.isLastAnnotationEntry()) {
139→            val noAnnotationWithParameters =
140→                node
141→                    .siblings(forward = false)
142→                    .none { it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
143→            if (noAnnotationWithParameters) {
144→                emit(
145→                    node.treeParent.startOffset,
146→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
147→                    true,
148→                )
149→                if (autoCorrect) {
150→                    node
151→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
152→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
153→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
154→                }
155→            }
156→        }
157→    }
158→
159→    private fun checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
160→        node: ASTNode,
161→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
162→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
163→    ) {
164→        val isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList =
165→            node
166→                .siblings(forward = true)
167→                .any { it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
168→        val isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine =
169→            node
170→                .siblings(forward = false)
171→                .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
172→        if (isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList || isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine) {
173→            emit(
174→                node.startOffset,
175→                "Annotation must be placed on separate line",
176→                true,
177→            )
178→            if (autoCorrect) {
179→                node
180→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
181→                    .nextLeaf()
182→                    ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
183→            }
184→        }
185→    }
186→
187→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() =
188→        getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
189→
190→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
191→        psi
192→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
193→            ?.useSiteTarget
194→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
195→
196→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() =
197→        getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
198→
199→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
200→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
201→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
202→
203→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
204→        treeParent
205→            .children()
206→            .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
207→            .let { it == this }
208→
209→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
210→        siblings(forward = false).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
211→
212→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
213→        siblings(forward = false)
214→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
215→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
216→
217→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
218→        siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
219→
220→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
221→        siblings(forward = true)
222→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
223→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
224→
225→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct() =
226→        lastChildLeafOrSelf()
227→            .leaves(forward = true)
228→            .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() || it.isPartOfComment() }
229→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
230→
231→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
232→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
233→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
234→        } else {
235→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
236→        }
237→
238→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
239→        node: ASTNode,
240→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
241→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
242→    ) {
243→        node
244→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
245→            .nextCodeLeaf()
246→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
247→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
248→
249→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
250→                    emit(
251→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
252→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
253→                        true,
254→                    )
255→                    if (autoCorrect) {
256→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
257→                    }
258→                }
259→            }
260→    }
261→
262→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
263→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations = modifierListRoot.treeParent.treePrev as? PsiWhiteSpace
264→        // If there is no whitespace before the annotation, the annotation is the first
265→        // text in the file
266→        val newLineWithIndent = nodeBeforeAnnotations?.text ?: "\n"
267→        return if (newLineWithIndent.contains('\n')) {
268→            // Make sure we only insert a single newline
269→            newLineWithIndent.substring(newLineWithIndent.lastIndexOf('\n'))
270→        } else {
271→            newLineWithIndent
272→        }
273→    }
274→}

1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.test.KtLintAssertThat.Companion.assertThatRule
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.test.LintViolation
  5→import org.junit.jupiter.api.Nested
  6→import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test
  7→
  8→class AnnotationRuleTest {
  9→    private val annotationRuleAssertThat = assertThatRule { AnnotationRule() }
 10→
 11→    @Test
 12→    fun `Given a single annotation on same line before the annotated construct`() {
 13→        val code =
 14→            """
 15→            @FunctionalInterface class FooBar {
 16→                @JvmField var foo: String
 17→                @Test fun bar() {}
 18→            }
 19→            """.trimIndent()
 20→        annotationRuleAssertThat(code).hasNoLintViolations()
 21→    }
 22→
 23→    @Test
 24→    fun `Given a single annotation on line above the annotated construct`() {
 25→        val code =
 26→            """
 27→            @FunctionalInterface
 28→            class FooBar {

 35→
 36→public class ModifierOrderRule : Rule("modifier-order") {
 37→
 38→    // subset of ElementType.MODIFIER_KEYWORDS_ARRAY (+ annotations entries)
 39→    private val order = arrayOf(
 40→        ANNOTATION_ENTRY,
 41→        PUBLIC_KEYWORD, PROTECTED_KEYWORD, PRIVATE_KEYWORD, INTERNAL_KEYWORD,
 42→        EXPECT_KEYWORD, ACTUAL_KEYWORD,
 43→        FINAL_KEYWORD, OPEN_KEYWORD, ABSTRACT_KEYWORD, SEALED_KEYWORD, CONST_KEYWORD,
 44→        EXTERNAL_KEYWORD,
 45→        OVERRIDE_KEYWORD,
 46→        LATEINIT_KEYWORD,
 47→        TAILREC_KEYWORD,
 48→        VARARG_KEYWORD,
 49→        SUSPEND_KEYWORD,
 50→        INNER_KEYWORD,
 51→        ENUM_KEYWORD, ANNOTATION_KEYWORD,
 52→        COMPANION_KEYWORD,
 53→        INLINE_KEYWORD,
 54→        INFIX_KEYWORD,
 55→        OPERATOR_KEYWORD,
 56→        DATA_KEYWORD,
 57→        // NOINLINE_KEYWORD, CROSSINLINE_KEYWORD, OUT_KEYWORD, IN_KEYWORD, REIFIED_KEYWORD
 58→        // HEADER_KEYWORD, IMPL_KEYWORD
 59→    )
 60→    private val tokenSet = TokenSet.create(*order)
 61→
 62→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 63→        node: ASTNode,
 64→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 65→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 66→    ) {
 67→        if (node.psi is KtDeclarationModifierList) {
 68→            val modifierArr = node.getChildren(tokenSet)
 69→            val sorted = modifierArr.copyOf().apply { sortWith(compareBy { order.indexOf(it.elementType) }) }
 70→            if (!Arrays.equals(modifierArr, sorted)) {
 71→                // Since annotations can be fairly lengthy and/or span multiple lines we are
 72→                // squashing them into a single placeholder text to guarantee a single line output
 73→                squashAnnotations(sorted)
 74→                    .joinToString(" ")
 75→                    .let { squashedAnnotations ->
 76→                        emit(
 77→                            node.startOffset,
 78→                            "Incorrect modifier order (should be \"$squashedAnnotations\")",
 79→                            true,
 80→                        )
 81→                    }
 82→                if (autoCorrect) {
 83→                    modifierArr.forEachIndexed { i, n ->
 84→                        node.replaceChild(n, sorted[i].clone() as ASTNode)
 85→                    }
 86→                }
 87→            }
 88→        }
 89→    }
 90→
 91→    private fun squashAnnotations(sorted: Array<ASTNode>): List<String> {
 92→        val nonAnnotationModifiers = sorted.filter { it.psi !is KtAnnotationEntry }
 93→        return if (nonAnnotationModifiers.size != sorted.size) {
 94→            listOf("@Annotation...") + nonAnnotationModifiers.map { it.text }
 95→        } else {
 96→            nonAnnotationModifiers.map { it.text }
 97→        }
 98→    }
 99→}

 4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.MODIFIER_LIST
 5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.children
 6→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 7→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiComment
 8→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiElement
 9→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiWhiteSpace
10→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
11→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtAnnotationEntry
12→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtDeclaration
13→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.getPrevSiblingIgnoringWhitespaceAndComments
14→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.prevLeaf
15→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.prevLeafs
16→
17→/**
18→ * @see https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-35106
19→ */
20→public class SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotationsRule : Rule("spacing-between-declarations-with-annotations") {
21→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
22→        node: ASTNode,
23→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
24→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
25→    ) {
26→        if (node.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST && node.hasAnnotationsAsChildren()) {
27→            val declaration = node.psi.parent as? KtDeclaration
28→            val prevDeclaration =
29→                declaration?.getPrevSiblingIgnoringWhitespaceAndComments(withItself = false) as? KtDeclaration
30→            val whiteSpaceAfterPreviousDeclaration = prevDeclaration?.nextSibling as? PsiWhiteSpace
31→            val startOfDeclarationIncludingLeadingComment = node.psi.parent.getPrevLeafIgnoringCommentAndWhitespaceExceptBlankLines()
32→            if (whiteSpaceAfterPreviousDeclaration?.text != null &&
33→                startOfDeclarationIncludingLeadingComment?.text?.count { it == '\n' } == 1
34→            ) {
35→                emit(
36→                    node.startOffset,
37→                    "Declarations and declarations with annotations should have an empty space between.",
38→                    true,
39→                )
40→                if (autoCorrect) {
41→                    val indent = whiteSpaceAfterPreviousDeclaration.text.substringAfter('\n')
42→                    (whiteSpaceAfterPreviousDeclaration.node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText("\n\n$indent")
43→                }
44→            }
45→        }
46→    }
47→
48→    /**
49→     * Gets the previous element but ignores white whitespaces (excluding blank lines) and comments. Note the difference
50→     * with method [PsiElement.getPrevSiblingIgnoringWhitespaceAndComments] which excludes blank lines as well.
51→     */
52→    private fun PsiElement.getPrevLeafIgnoringCommentAndWhitespaceExceptBlankLines(): PsiElement? {
53→        var prevLeaf: PsiElement? = this.prevLeaf()
54→        val iterator = prevLeafs.iterator()
55→        while (iterator.hasNext()) {
56→            val psiElement = iterator.next()
57→            if (psiElement is PsiComment || (psiElement is PsiWhiteSpace && psiElement.text?.count { it == '\n' } == 1)) {
58→                prevLeaf = psiElement
59→            } else {
60→                break
61→            }
62→        }
63→        return prevLeaf
64→    }
65→
66→    private fun ASTNode.hasAnnotationsAsChildren(): Boolean = children().find { it.psi is KtAnnotationEntry } != null
67→}

1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.Rule
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION
  5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATION
  6→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATION_ENTRY
  7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST
  8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST
  9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_ARGUMENT
 10→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST
 11→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_PARAMETER
 12→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.WHITE_SPACE
 13→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.children
 14→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.firstChildLeafOrSelf
 15→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isPartOf
 16→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isPartOfComment
 17→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isWhiteSpace
 18→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline
 19→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.lastChildLeafOrSelf
 20→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.nextCodeLeaf
 21→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.nextLeaf
 22→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.prevLeaf
 23→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 24→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 25→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiWhiteSpace
 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 28→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.descriptors.annotations.AnnotationUseSiteTarget
 29→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtAnnotationEntry
 30→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 31→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.siblings
 32→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.utils.addToStdlib.safeAs
 33→
 34→/**
 35→ * Ensures multiple annotations are not on the same line as the annotated declaration. Also ensures that annotations
 36→ * with parameters are placed on separate lines.
 37→ *
 38→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 39→ *
 40→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules. Moved since
 41→ */
 42→public class AnnotationRule : Rule("annotation") {
 43→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 44→        node: ASTNode,
 45→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 46→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 47→    ) {
 48→        when (node.elementType) {
 49→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
 50→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 51→            }
 52→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY ->
 53→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 54→        }
 55→    }
 56→
 57→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
 58→        node: ASTNode,
 59→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 60→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 61→    ) {
 62→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
 63→
 64→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
 65→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER && // fun fn(@Ann("blah") a: String)
 66→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT && // fn(@Ann("blah") "42")
 67→            !node.isPartOf(TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST) && // val property: Map<@Ann("blah") String, Int>
 68→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
 69→        ) {
 70→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 71→        }
 72→
 73→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
 74→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct())
 75→        ) {
 76→            checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 77→        }
 78→
 79→        if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
 80→            node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() &&
 81→            node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
 82→        ) {
 83→            checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 84→        }
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
 88→        node: ASTNode,
 89→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 90→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 91→    ) {
 92→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
 93→            emit(
 94→                node.startOffset,
 95→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
 96→                true,
 97→            )
 98→            if (autoCorrect) {
 99→                node
100→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
101→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
102→            }
103→        }
104→
105→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
106→            emit(
107→                node.startOffset,
108→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
109→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
110→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
111→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
112→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
113→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
114→            )
115→            if (autoCorrect) {
116→                node
117→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
118→                    .nextLeaf()
119→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
120→                    ?.let {
121→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
122→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
123→                        } else {
124→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
125→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
126→                            )
127→                        }
128→                    }
129→            }
130→        }
131→    }
132→
133→    private fun checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(
134→        node: ASTNode,
135→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
136→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
137→    ) {
138→        if (node.isLastAnnotationEntry()) {
139→            val noAnnotationWithParameters =
140→                node
141→                    .siblings(forward = false)
142→                    .none { it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
143→            if (noAnnotationWithParameters) {
144→                emit(
145→                    node.treeParent.startOffset,
146→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
147→                    true,
148→                )
149→                if (autoCorrect) {
150→                    node
151→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
152→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
153→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
154→                }
155→            }
156→        }
157→    }
158→
159→    private fun checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
160→        node: ASTNode,
161→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
162→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
163→    ) {
164→        val isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList =
165→            node
166→                .siblings(forward = true)
167→                .any { it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
168→        val isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine =
169→            node
170→                .siblings(forward = false)
171→                .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
172→        if (isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList || isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine) {
173→            emit(
174→                node.startOffset,
175→                "Annotation must be placed on separate line",
176→                true,
177→            )
178→            if (autoCorrect) {
179→                node
180→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
181→                    .nextLeaf()
182→                    ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
183→            }
184→        }
185→    }
186→
187→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() =
188→        getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
189→
190→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
191→        psi
192→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
193→            ?.useSiteTarget
194→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
195→
196→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() =
197→        getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
198→
199→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
200→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
201→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
202→
203→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
204→        treeParent
205→            .children()
206→            .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
207→            .let { it == this }
208→
209→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
210→        siblings(forward = false).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
211→
212→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
213→        siblings(forward = false)
214→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
215→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
216→
217→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
218→        siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
219→
220→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
221→        siblings(forward = true)
222→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
223→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
224→
225→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct() =
226→        lastChildLeafOrSelf()
227→            .leaves(forward = true)
228→            .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() || it.isPartOfComment() }
229→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
230→
231→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
232→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
233→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
234→        } else {
235→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
236→        }
237→
238→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
239→        node: ASTNode,
240→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
241→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
242→    ) {
243→        node
244→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
245→            .nextCodeLeaf()
246→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
247→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
248→
249→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
250→                    emit(
251→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
252→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
253→                        true,
254→                    )
255→                    if (autoCorrect) {
256→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
257→                    }
258→                }
259→            }
260→    }
261→
262→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
263→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations = modifierListRoot.treeParent.treePrev as? PsiWhiteSpace
264→        // If there is no whitespace before the annotation, the annotation is the first
265→        // text in the file
266→        val newLineWithIndent = nodeBeforeAnnotations?.text ?: "\n"
267→        return if (newLineWithIndent.contains('\n')) {
268→            // Make sure we only insert a single newline
269→            newLineWithIndent.substring(newLineWithIndent.lastIndexOf('\n'))
270→        } else {
271→            newLineWithIndent
272→        }
273→    }
274→}

    fun `Given an annotation with multiple annotation entries on the same line as the annotated construct`() {

","new_string":"    @Test
    fun `Given an annotation with multiple annotation entries on the same line as the annotated construct`() {
        val code =
            """
            @[JvmStatic Provides] fun foo() = 42
            """.trimIndent()
        val formattedCode =
            """
            @[JvmStatic Provides]
            fun foo() = 42
            """.trimIndent()
        annotationRuleAssertThat(code)
            .hasLintViolation(1, 1, "Annotation must be placed on separate line")
            .isFormattedAs(formattedCode)
    }

    @Test
    fun `Given an annotation with multiple annotation entries followed by another annotation on the same line as the annotated construct`() {
        val code =
            """
            @[A B] @C fun foo() = 42
            """.trimIndent()
        val formattedCode =
            """
            @[A B]
            @C
            fun foo() = 42
            """.trimIndent()
        annotationRuleAssertThat(code)

1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.Rule
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION
  5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATION
  6→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATION_ENTRY
  7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST
  8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST
  9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_ARGUMENT
 10→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST
 11→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_PARAMETER
 12→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.WHITE_SPACE
 13→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.children
 14→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.firstChildLeafOrSelf
 15→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isPartOf
 16→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isPartOfComment
 17→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isWhiteSpace
 18→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline
 19→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.lastChildLeafOrSelf
 20→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.nextCodeLeaf
 21→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.nextLeaf
 22→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.prevLeaf
 23→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 24→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 25→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiWhiteSpace
 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 28→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.descriptors.annotations.AnnotationUseSiteTarget
 29→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtAnnotation
 30→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtAnnotationEntry
 31→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 32→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.siblings
 33→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.utils.addToStdlib.safeAs
 34→
 35→/**
 36→ * Ensures multiple annotations are not on the same line as the annotated declaration. Also ensures that annotations
 37→ * with parameters are placed on separate lines.
 38→ *
 39→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 40→ *
 41→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules. Moved since
 42→ */
 43→public class AnnotationRule : Rule("annotation") {
 44→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 45→        node: ASTNode,
 46→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 47→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 48→    ) {
 49→        when (node.elementType) {
 50→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
 51→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 52→            }
 53→            ANNOTATION ->
 54→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 55→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY ->
 56→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 57→        }
 58→    }
 59→
 60→    private fun visitAnnotation(
 61→        node: ASTNode,
 62→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 63→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 64→    ) {
 65→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
 66→
 67→        if (node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
 68→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
 69→            !node.isPartOf(TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST) &&
 70→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
 71→        ) {
 72→            if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
 73→                emit(
 74→                    node.startOffset,
 75→                    "Annotation must be placed on separate line",
 76→                    true,
 77→                )
 78→                if (autoCorrect) {
 79→                    node
 80→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 81→                        .nextLeaf()
 82→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
 83→                }
 84→            }
 85→        }
 86→    }
 87→
 88→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
 89→        node: ASTNode,
 90→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 91→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 92→    ) {
 93→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
 94→
 95→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
 96→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER && // fun fn(@Ann("blah") a: String)
 97→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT && // fn(@Ann("blah") "42")
 98→            !node.isPartOf(TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST) && // val property: Map<@Ann("blah") String, Int>
 99→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
100→        ) {
101→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
102→        }
103→
104→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
105→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct())
106→        ) {
107→            checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
108→        }
109→
110→        if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
111→            node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() &&
112→            node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
113→        ) {
114→            checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(node, emit, autoCorrect)
115→        }
116→    }
117→
118→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
119→        node: ASTNode,
120→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
121→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
122→    ) {
123→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
124→            emit(
125→                node.startOffset,
126→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
127→                true,
128→            )
129→            if (autoCorrect) {
130→                node
131→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
132→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
133→            }
134→        }
135→
136→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
137→            emit(
138→                node.startOffset,
139→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
140→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
141→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
142→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
143→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
144→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
145→            )
146→            if (autoCorrect) {
147→                node
148→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
149→                    .nextLeaf()
150→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
151→                    ?.let {
152→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
153→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
154→                        } else {
155→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
156→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
157→                            )
158→                        }
159→                    }
160→            }
161→        }
162→    }
163→
164→    private fun checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(
165→        node: ASTNode,
166→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
167→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
168→    ) {
169→        if (node.isLastAnnotationEntry()) {
170→            val noAnnotationWithParameters =
171→                node
172→                    .siblings(forward = false)
173→                    .none { it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
174→            if (noAnnotationWithParameters) {
175→                emit(
176→                    node.treeParent.startOffset,
177→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
178→                    true,
179→                )
180→                if (autoCorrect) {
181→                    node
182→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
183→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
184→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
185→                }
186→            }
187→        }
188→    }
189→
190→    private fun checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
191→        node: ASTNode,
192→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
193→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
194→    ) {
195→        val isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList =
196→            node
197→                .siblings(forward = true)
198→                .any { it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
199→        val isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine =
200→            node
201→                .siblings(forward = false)
202→                .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
203→        if (isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList || isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine) {
204→            emit(
205→                node.startOffset,
206→                "Annotation must be placed on separate line",
207→                true,
208→            )
209→            if (autoCorrect) {
210→                node
211→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
212→                    .nextLeaf()
213→                    ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
214→            }
215→        }
216→    }
217→
218→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() =
219→        getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
220→
221→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
222→        psi
223→            .let {
224→                when (it) {
225→                    is KtAnnotationEntry -> it.useSiteTarget
226→                    is KtAnnotation -> it.useSiteTarget
227→                    else -> null
228→                }
229→            }
230→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
231→
232→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() =
233→        getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
234→
235→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
236→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
237→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
238→
239→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
240→        treeParent
241→            .children()
242→            .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
243→            .let { it == this }
244→
245→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
246→        siblings(forward = false).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
247→
248→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
249→        siblings(forward = false)
250→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
251→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
252→
253→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
254→        siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
255→
256→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
257→        siblings(forward = true)
258→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
259→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
260→
261→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct() =
262→        lastChildLeafOrSelf()
263→            .leaves(forward = true)
264→            .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() || it.isPartOfComment() }
265→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
266→
267→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
268→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
269→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
270→        } else {
271→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
272→        }
273→
274→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
275→        node: ASTNode,
276→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
277→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
278→    ) {
279→        node
280→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
281→            .nextCodeLeaf()
282→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
283→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
284→
285→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
286→                    emit(
287→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
288→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
289→                        true,
290→                    )
291→                    if (autoCorrect) {
292→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
293→                    }
294→                }
295→            }
296→    }
297→
298→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
299→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations = modifierListRoot.treeParent.treePrev as? PsiWhiteSpace
300→        // If there is no whitespace before the annotation, the annotation is the first
301→        // text in the file
302→        val newLineWithIndent = nodeBeforeAnnotations?.text ?: "\n"
303→        return if (newLineWithIndent.contains('\n')) {
304→            // Make sure we only insert a single newline
305→            newLineWithIndent.substring(newLineWithIndent.lastIndexOf('\n'))
306→        } else {
307→            newLineWithIndent
308→        }
309→    }
310→}
311→

  7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST
  8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST
  9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_ARGUMENT
 10→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST
 11→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_PARAMETER
 12→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.WHITE_SPACE
 13→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.children
 14→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.firstChildLeafOrSelf
 15→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isPartOf
 16→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isPartOfComment
 17→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isWhiteSpace
 18→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline
 19→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.lastChildLeafOrSelf
 20→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.nextCodeLeaf
 21→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.nextLeaf
 22→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.prevLeaf
 23→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 24→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 25→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiWhiteSpace
 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 28→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.descriptors.annotations.AnnotationUseSiteTarget
 29→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtAnnotation
 30→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtAnnotationEntry
 31→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 32→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.siblings
 33→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.utils.addToStdlib.safeAs
 34→
 35→/**
 36→ * Ensures multiple annotations are not on the same line as the annotated declaration. Also ensures that annotations
 37→ * with parameters are placed on separate lines.
 38→ *
 39→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 40→ *
 41→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules. Moved since
 42→ */
 43→public class AnnotationRule : Rule("annotation") {
 44→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 45→        node: ASTNode,
 46→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 47→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 48→    ) {
 49→        when (node.elementType) {
 50→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
 51→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 52→            }
 53→            ANNOTATION ->
 54→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 55→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY ->
 56→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 57→        }
 58→    }
 59→
 60→    private fun visitAnnotation(
 61→        node: ASTNode,
 62→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 63→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 64→    ) {
 65→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
 66→
 67→        if (node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
 68→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
 69→            !node.isPartOf(TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST) &&
 70→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
 71→        ) {
 72→            if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
 73→                emit(
 74→                    node.startOffset,
 75→                    "Annotation must be placed on separate line",
 76→                    true,
 77→                )
 78→                if (autoCorrect) {
 79→                    node
 80→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 81→                        .nextLeaf()
 82→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
 83→                }
 84→            }
 85→        }
 86→    }
 87→
 88→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
 89→        node: ASTNode,
 90→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 91→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 92→    ) {
 93→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
 94→
 95→        if (node.isAnnotationWithValueArgumentList() &&
 96→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER && // fun fn(@Ann("blah") a: String)
 97→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT && // fn(@Ann("blah") "42")
 98→            !node.isPartOf(TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST) && // val property: Map<@Ann("blah") String, Int>
 99→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
100→        ) {
101→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
102→        }
103→
104→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotation() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotation()) ||
105→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotation() && node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct())
106→        ) {
107→            checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
108→        }
109→
110→        if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
111→            node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotation() &&
112→            node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
113→        ) {
114→            checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(node, emit, autoCorrect)
115→        }
116→    }
117→
118→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
119→        node: ASTNode,
120→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
121→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
122→    ) {
123→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotation() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotation()) {
124→            emit(
125→                node.startOffset,
126→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
127→                true,
128→            )
129→            if (autoCorrect) {
130→                node
131→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
132→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
133→            }
134→        }
135→
136→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
137→            emit(
138→                node.startOffset,
139→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
140→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
141→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
142→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
143→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
144→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
145→            )
146→            if (autoCorrect) {
147→                node
148→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
149→                    .nextLeaf()
150→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
151→                    ?.let {
152→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
153→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
154→                        } else {
155→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
156→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
157→                            )
158→                        }
159→                    }
160→            }
161→        }
162→    }
163→
164→    private fun checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(
165→        node: ASTNode,
166→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
167→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
168→    ) {
169→        if (node.isLastAnnotation()) {
170→            val noAnnotationWithParameters =
171→                node
172→                    .siblings(forward = false)
173→                    .none { it.isAnnotationWithValueArgumentList() }
174→            if (noAnnotationWithParameters) {
175→                emit(
176→                    node.treeParent.startOffset,
177→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
178→                    true,
179→                )
180→                if (autoCorrect) {
181→                    node
182→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
183→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
184→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
185→                }
186→            }
187→        }
188→    }
189→
190→    private fun checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
191→        node: ASTNode,
192→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
193→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
194→    ) {
195→        val isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList =
196→            node
197→                .siblings(forward = true)
198→                .any { it.isAnnotationWithValueArgumentList() }
199→        val isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine =
200→            node
201→                .siblings(forward = false)
202→                .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
203→        if (isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList || isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine) {
204→            emit(
205→                node.startOffset,
206→                "Annotation must be placed on separate line",
207→                true,
208→            )
209→            if (autoCorrect) {
210→                node
211→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
212→                    .nextLeaf()
213→                    ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
214→            }
215→        }
216→    }
217→
218→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() =
219→        getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
220→
221→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
222→        psi
223→            .let {
224→                when (it) {
225→                    is KtAnnotationEntry -> it.useSiteTarget
226→                    is KtAnnotation -> it.useSiteTarget
227→                    else -> null
228→                }
229→            }
230→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
231→
232→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotation() =
233→        elementType == ANNOTATION || elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY
234→
235→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationWithValueArgumentList(): Boolean =
236→        if (elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY) {
237→            getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
238→        } else if (elementType == ANNOTATION) {
239→            children().any { it.isAnnotationWithValueArgumentList() }
240→        } else {
241→            false
242→        }
243→
244→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
245→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
246→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
247→
248→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotation() =
249→        treeParent
250→            .children()
251→            .lastOrNull { it.isAnnotation() }
252→            .let { it == this }
253→
254→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotation() =
255→        siblings(forward = false).any { it.isAnnotation() }
256→
257→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotation() =
258→        siblings(forward = false)
259→            .takeWhile { !it.isAnnotation() }
260→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
261→
262→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotation() =
263→        siblings(forward = true).any { it.isAnnotation() }
264→
265→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotation() =
266→        siblings(forward = true)
267→            .takeWhile { !it.isAnnotation() }
268→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
269→
270→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct() =
271→        lastChildLeafOrSelf()
272→            .leaves(forward = true)
273→            .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() || it.isPartOfComment() }
274→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
275→
276→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
277→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotation()) {
278→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotation()
279→        } else {
280→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
281→        }
282→
283→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
284→        node: ASTNode,
285→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
286→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
287→    ) {
288→        node
289→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
290→            .nextCodeLeaf()
291→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
292→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
293→
294→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
295→                    emit(
296→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
297→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
298→                        true,
299→                    )
300→                    if (autoCorrect) {
301→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
302→                    }
303→                }
304→            }
305→    }
306→
307→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
308→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations = modifierListRoot.treeParent.treePrev as? PsiWhiteSpace
309→        // If there is no whitespace before the annotation, the annotation is the first
310→        // text in the file
311→        val newLineWithIndent = nodeBeforeAnnotations?.text ?: "\n"
312→        return if (newLineWithIndent.contains('\n')) {
313→            // Make sure we only insert a single newline
314→            newLineWithIndent.substring(newLineWithIndent.lastIndexOf('\n'))
315→        } else {
316→            newLineWithIndent
317→        }
318→    }
319→}

0→# Changelog
 1→All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
 2→This project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/).
 3→
 4→## Unreleased
 5→
 6→### Added
 7→
 8→### Removed
 9→
10→### Fixed
11→* Do not enable the experimental rules by default when `.editorconfig` properties `disabled_rules` or `ktlint_disabled_rules` are set. ([#1771](https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/1771))
12→* A function signature not having any parameters which exceeds the `max-line-length` should be ignored by rule `function-signature` ([#1773](https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/1773))
13→* 
14→
15→### Changed
16→
17→## [0.48.1] - 2023-01-03
18→
19→### Added
20→
21→### Removed
22→
23→### Fixed
24→
25→* An enumeration class having a primary constructor and in which the list of enum entries is followed by a semicolon then do not remove the semicolon in case it is followed by code element `no-semi` ([#1733](https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/1733))
26→* Add API so that KtLint API consumer is able to process a Kotlin script snippet without having to specify a file path ([#1738](https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/1738))
27→* Disable the `standard:filename` rule whenever Ktlint CLI is run with option `--stdin` ([#1742](https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/1742))
28→* Fix initialization of the logger when `--log-level` is specified. Throw exception when an invalid value is passed. ([#1749](https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/1749))
29→* Fix loading of custom rule set JARs.
30→* Rules provided via a custom rule set JAR (Ktlint CLI) or by an API provider are enabled by default. Only rules in the `experimental` rule set are disabled by default. ([#1747](https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/1747))
31→
32→### Changed
33→
34→* Update Kotlin development version to `1.8.0` and Kotlin version to `1.8.0`.
35→
36→## [0.48.0] - 2022-12-15
37→
38→### Indent rule
39→
40→The `indent` rule has been rewritten from scratch. Solving problems in the old algorithm was very difficult. With the new algorithm this becomes a lot easier. Although the new implementation of the rule has been compared against several open source projects containing over 400,000 lines of code, it is still likely that new issues will be discovered. Please report your indentation issues so that these can be fixed as well.
41→
42→### `.editorconfig` property to disable rules
43→
44→In the previous release (0.47.x), the `.editorconfig`  property `disabled_rules` was deprecated and replaced with `ktlint_disabled_rules`. This latter property has now been deprecated as well in favour of a more flexible and better maintainable solution. Rule and rule sets can now be enabled/disabled with a separate property per rule (set). Please read [deprecation of (ktlint_)disable_rules property](https://pinterest.github.io/ktlint/faq/#why-is-editorconfig-property-disabled_rules-deprecated-and-how-do-i-resolve-this) for more information.
45→
46→The KtLint CLI has not been changed. Although you can still use parameter `--experimental` to enable KtLint's Experimental rule set, you might want to set `.editorconfig` property `ktlint_experimental = enabled` instead.
47→
48→### API Changes & RuleSet providers
49→
50→If you are not an API consumer or Rule Set provider then you can skip this section.
51→
52→#### Class relocations
53→
54→Classes below have been relocated:
55→
56→* Class `com.pinterest.ktlint.core.api.UsesEditorConfigProperties.EditorConfigProperty` has been replaced with `com.pinterest.ktlint.core.api.editorconfig.EditorConfigProperty`. 
57→* Class `com.pinterest.ktlint.core.KtLintParseException` has been replaced with `com.pinterest.ktlint.core.api.KtLintParseException`.
58→* Class `com.pinterest.ktlint.core.RuleExecutionException` has been replaced with `com.pinterest.ktlint.core.api.KtLintRuleException`.
59→* Class `com.pinterest.ktlint.reporter.format.internal.Color` has been moved to `com.pinterest.ktlint.reporter.format.Color`.
60→* Class `com.pinterest.ktlint.reporter.plain.internal.Color` has been moved to `com.pinterest.ktlint.reporter.plain.Color`.
61→
62→#### Invoking `lint` and `format`
63→
64→This is the last release that supports the `ExperimentalParams` to invoke the `lint` and `format` functions of KtLint. The `ExperimentalParams` contains a mix of configuration settings which are not dependent on the file/code which is to be processed. Other parameters in that class describe the code/file to be processed but can be configured inconsistently (for example a file with name "foo.kt" could be marked as a Kotlin Script file).
65→
66→The static object `KtLint` is deprecated and replaced by class `KtLintRuleEngine` which is configured with `KtLintRuleEngineConfiguration`. The instance of the `KtLintRuleEngine` is intended to be reused for scanning all files in a project and should not be recreated per file.
67→
68→Both `lint` and `format` are simplified and can now be called for a code block or for an entire file.
69→
70→```kotlin
71→import java.io.File
72→
73→// Define a reusable instance of the KtLint Rule Engine
74→val ktLintRuleEngine = KtLintRuleEngine(
75→  // Define configuration
76→)
77→
78→
79→// Process a collection of files
80→val files: Set<File> // Collect files in a convenient way
81→files.forEach(file in files) {
82→    ktLintRuleEngine.lint(file) {
83→        // Handle lint violations
84→    }
85→}
86→
87→// or process a code sample for a given filepath
88→ktLintRuleEngine.lint(
89→  code = "code to be linted",
90→  filePath = Path("/path/to/source/file")
91→) {
92→  // Handle lint violations
93→}
94→```
95→
96→#### Retrieve `.editorconfig`s
97→
98→The list of `.editorconfig` files which will be accessed by KtLint when linting or formatting a given path can now be retrieved with the new API `KtLint.editorConfigFilePaths(path: Path): List<Path>`. 
99→
